query:
SELECT EXISTS (
                SELECT 1 FROM room_memberships rm1
                JOIN room_memberships rm2 ON rm1.room_id = rm2.room_id
                WHERE rm1.user_id = $1
                  AND rm2.user_id = $2
                  AND rm1.membership = 'join'
                  AND rm2.membership = 'join'
            ) as "exists!"
